items.name: Floating Pose ⭐️ FIXED
items.description:
⭐FAV FOR CHEAPER⭐

Give your avatar a dreamy, magical vibe with the Floating Pose emote! This graceful and aesthetic UGC animation is perfect for players who love soft, elegant, and mystical idle poses. Whether you’re creating profile pictures, edits, roleplaying, or showcasing your avatar in social worlds, this emote adds charm, personality, and a floating, ethereal style.

Designed with smooth motion and a clean loop, Floating Pose works perfectly in aesthetic worlds, social hangouts, party games, and avatar showcases. Make your character stand out, radiate magical energy, and let your avatar float with style!

Equip it, favorite it, and let your avatar glide with elegance and charm! ✨💫
